title: Viral metagenomics using SMART-9n amplification and nanopore sequencing
author: Ingra Claro Morales
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7w5hpg6
materials: Recover filtrate into 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube
Start the following program on a thermocycler: 42 °C for 01:30:00 70 °C for 00:10:00

steps.title: Transfer up to 500 µL sample...
steps.instruction: Transfer up to 500 µL sample directly onto a Ultrafree-MC Centrifugal Filter column

steps.title: Spin at 5000 x g for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Spin at 5000 x g for 00:01:00

steps.title: Remove basket and discard
steps.instruction: Remove basket and discard

steps.title: Close lid and place on ice
steps.instruction: Close lid and place on ice

steps.title: In a 2 mL Eppendorf tube...
steps.instruction: In a 2 mL Eppendorf tube combine 200 µL sample, 200 µL DNA/RNA Shield (2x concentrate) and mix well by pipetting

steps.title: Add 800 µL Viral RNA Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 800 µL Viral RNA Buffer and mix well by pipetting

steps.title: Load 600 µL onto a column...
steps.instruction: Load 600 µL onto a column in a collection tube and spin at 10000 x g for 00:00:15 discard flow through, place in a new collection tube

steps.title: Add 500 µL Viral wash buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Viral wash buffer and spin at 10000 x g for 00:00:15 , discard flow through

steps.title: Add 500 µL 100% ethanol and...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL 100% ethanol and spin at 10000 x g for 00:01:00 , discard flow through, place in a clean 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: Add 15 µL of DNA/RNA-Free Water...
steps.instruction: Add 15 µL of DNA/RNA-Free Water and incubate at RT for 00:03:00

steps.title: Spin at 10000 x g for 00:00:15
steps.instruction: Spin at 10000 x g for 00:00:15

steps.title: Set heat block to 37 °C
steps.instruction: Set heat block to 37 °C

steps.title: Set up the following reaction
steps.instruction: Set up the following reaction: Component Volume RNA 44 µL 10X TURBO DNase Buffer 5 µL TURBO DNase 1 µL Total 50 µL

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00

steps.title: Add 100 µL RNA Binding Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL RNA Binding Buffer and mix by vortexing 00:00:05 and spin down

steps.title: Add 150 µL 100% ethanol and...
steps.instruction: Add 150 µL 100% ethanol and mix by vortexing for 00:00:15 and spin down

steps.title: Transfer 300 µL to a Zymo-Spin...
steps.instruction: Transfer 300 µL to a Zymo-Spin IC column in a 2 mL collection tube and spin at 6000 x g for 00:00:15 discard flow through

steps.title: Add 400 µL RNA Prep Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL RNA Prep Buffer and spin at 6000 x g for 00:00:15 , discard flow through

steps.title: Add 700 µL RNA Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL RNA Wash Buffer and spin at 6000 x g for 00:00:15 , discard flow through and place in a new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube

steps.title: Add 10 µL DNase/RNase Free Water...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL DNase/RNase Free Water and incubate at RT for 00:01:00

steps.title: Spin at 6000 x g for 00:00:15
steps.instruction: Spin at 6000 x g for 00:00:15

steps.title: Label as ‘Viral RNA’ and place on ice
steps.instruction: Label as ‘Viral RNA’ and place on ice

steps.title: Set heat block to 55 °C
steps.instruction: Set heat block to 55 °C

steps.title: In a 2 mL Eppendorf tube...
steps.instruction: In a 2 mL Eppendorf tube combine 200 µL sample, 200 µL DNA/RNA Shield (2X concentrate), 20 µL Proteinase K and mix well by pipetting

steps.title: Incubate at 55 °C for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 55 °C for 00:30:00

steps.title: Set heat block to 60 °C
steps.instruction: Set heat block to 60 °C

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.200 mL binding buffer and mix well

steps.title: Load 800 µL onto a Zymo-Spin...
steps.instruction: Load 800 µL onto a Zymo-Spin IIC-Z column in a collection tube and spin at 8000 x g for 00:00:15 , discard the discard flow-through and reload as many times as required

steps.title: Transfer to to a new collection...
steps.instruction: Transfer to to a new collection tube add 400 µL DNA Wash Buffer 1 and spin at 8000 x g for 00:00:15 , discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 700 µL DNA Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL DNA Wash Buffer 2 and spin at 8000 x g for 00:00:15 .

steps.title: Add 200 µL DNA Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL DNA Wash Buffer 2 and spin at 8000 x g for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Transfer to a new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer to a new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube and 50 µL DNA/RNA Free Water preheated to 60 °C to the column, incubate at RT for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Spin at 8000 x g for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Spin at 8000 x g for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Combine the following in a 0
steps.instruction: Combine the following in a 0.2ml 8-strip tube. Component Volume RLB RT 9N (2 uM) 1 µL dNTPs (10 mM ea.) 1 µL Template RNA 10 µL Total 12 µL

steps.title: Mix and spin down
steps.instruction: Mix and spin down.

steps.title: Incubate at 65 °C for 00:05:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65 °C for 00:05:00 then snap cool on ice.

steps.title: Make up the following master mix...
steps.instruction: Make up the following master mix and add 8 µL to the 12 µL annealed RNA: Component Volume SSIV buffer (5x) 4 µL DTT (100 mM) 1 µL RNase OUT 1 µL SS IV RTase (200 U/ul) 1 µL RLB TSO (2 uM) 1 µL Total 20 µL

steps.title: Set up the following reaction to...
steps.instruction: Set up the following reaction to amplify cDNA in a new 0.2ml 8-strip tube: Component Volume LongAmp Taq 2X master mix 25 µL RLB (01-12) 0.5 µL NFW 19.5 µL cDNA 5 µL Total 50 µL

steps.title: Start the following program on the thermal cycler
steps.instruction: Start the following program on the thermal cycler: Step Temperature Time Cycles Heat Activation 95 °C 00:00:45 1 Denaturation 95 °C 00:00:15 26 Annealing 56 °C 00:00:15 26 Extension 65 °C 00:05:00 26 Final extension 65 °C 00:10:00 1 Hold 4 °C Indefinite 1

steps.title: Clean up products with 1x Ampure...
steps.instruction: Clean up products with 1x Ampure XP and elute in 30 ul EB Amplicon clean-up using SPRI beads by Josh Quick

steps.title: Quantify the PCR products using the...
steps.instruction: Quantify the PCR products using the Quantus Fluorometer using the ONE dsDNA assay. DNA quantification using the Quantus fluorometer by Josh Quick

steps.title: Pool all barcoded products to a...
steps.instruction: Pool all barcoded products to a total of 200 Femtomolar (fM) in 10 µL of 10 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl pH 8.0 with 50 millimolar (mM) NaCl

steps.title: Add 1 µL RAP adapter and...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL RAP adapter and mix by pipetting, incubate at RT 00:05:00

steps.title: Prime the flowcell and load sequencing library onto the flowcell
steps.instruction: Prime the flowcell and load sequencing library onto the flowcell. Priming and loading a MinION flowcell by Josh Quick
